title: Native AG-UI-compatible AI UI driver
objective: Add a self-hosted native UI driver that consumes the AG-UI-compatible endpoint and local_business protocol extensions without requiring Copilot Runtime.
non_goals: Do not build a full chat product outside the existing Django shell.
Do not implement backend domain writes in the browser.
Do not bypass Django permissions or confirmation flow.
acceptance_checks: Native UI sends AG-UI-compatible run input.
Native UI renders text, tool trace and run errors.
Native UI handles local_business.protocol and open_right_panel.v1.
Native UI ignores unknown extensions safely.
